promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected immediately after the ultra-sweep terminal batch because the raw-order simpy strip is already complete and the next bounded step is a reusable closure packet, not another raw-order family.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the strongest post-strip contradiction set: exhaustion versus coverage, comparison reuse versus direct source membership, paired-family backlog priority, mixed residual class separation, and visibility-layer noncollapse.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The ultra-sweep A2-mid batch provides the terminal raw-order handoff, the sims evidence-boundary batch provides the catalog/evidence/source separation pattern, and the sim-suite-v1 provenance batch provides the strongest already-refined noncollapse rule between indirect influence and direct provenance.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred one step because this turn preserves the reusable closure rule that residual work is a new prioritization lane rather than unfinished raw-order strip continuation.
Not selected because it would collapse paired families, orphans, diagnostics, proofs, and hygiene into one oversized story.
Not selected because the existing closure-audit intake is already sufficient for this second-pass reduction.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent closure-audit batch plus nearby A2-mid sims anchors were sufficient to isolate the reusable post-raw-order closure packets without reopening raw sims files.

candidate_items.name: RAW_ORDER_EXHAUSTION_NOT_FULL_COVERAGE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the closure audit's main contradiction in the smallest reusable form.

candidate_items.name: DIRECT_SOURCE_MEMBERSHIP_OVER_COMPARISON_REUSE_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the sharpest provenance split in the parent residual audit.

candidate_items.name: PAIRED_RESIDUAL_BACKLOG_PRIORITY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest restart queue without ranking or inflating the individual pairs.

candidate_items.name: NONPAIRED_RESIDUAL_REBOUND_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest class-separation rule for residual orphans, diagnostics, and hygiene.

candidate_items.name: CATALOG_EVIDENCE_SOURCE_VISIBILITY_TRIAD_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest visibility-layer compression for residual closure work.

candidate_items.name: POST_RAW_ORDER_WORK_IS_RESIDUAL_PRIORITIZATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the cleanest handoff from finished raw-order extraction into later residual work.

quarantined_items.name: RAW_ORDER_EXHAUSTION_AS_FULL_SIMS_COVERAGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves residual sims-side files outside direct source membership after raw-order exhaustion.

quarantined_items.name: COMPARISON_REUSE_AS_DIRECT_SOURCE_COVERAGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Comparison-anchor influence is weaker than direct source membership and would erase the parent batch's provenance split.

quarantined_items.name: ALL_RESIDUAL_ARTIFACTS_AS_CLEAN_PAIRED_FAMILIES
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly splits paired families from runner-only, result-only, diagnostic, proof, cache, and noise residue.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_OR_EVIDENCE_VISIBILITY_AS_LOCAL_FAMILY_COVERAGE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog visibility and evidence-pack visibility are both weaker than direct source membership for this closure audit.

quarantined_items.name: MORE_RAW_ORDER_SIMPY_CONTINUATION_REMAINS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly marks the raw-order strip as exhausted and reclassifies later work as residual prioritization.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates preserve the strongest reusable closure rules after raw-order exhaustion without reopening raw sims files.
They keep provenance, coverage, backlog priority, residual class boundaries, and visibility layers separate instead of collapsing them into one closure story.
They remain small, source-linked, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later residual family work.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain coverage overreads, provenance overreads, class-flattening overreads, or continuation-mode overreads rather than reusable A2-2 packets.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated entirely from existing intake artifacts after the required control-surface reads already completed earlier in the thread.
Used nearby A2-mid sims batches only as comparison anchors.
No raw source reread, runtime execution, or A2-1 mutation was performed.
